title: Double Jump
body:
Ever wanted to feed your ceaseless hunger for adventure? This datapack allows you to increase your sense of freedom by increasing your mobility due to the ability to jump twice. Like, literally this is all it does.

## How to use:
1. Jump - Click your jump keybind to launch yourself into the air
2. Release - Stop holding your jump keybind
3. Jump again! - Click your jump keybind to launch yourself higher into the air
